english_text: A (1-20) Faith vs Disbelief; B (21-39) Allah's creation and knowledge; C (40-103) Deliverance of Shariah to Bani Israel; D (104-141) Details of how Ibrahim (AS) was tested; E (142-152) Ka'ba is the new qibla; F (153-177) Details of how Muslims will be tested; G (178-253) Deliverance of Shariah to Muslims; H (254-284) Allah's creation and knowledge; I (285-286) Faith vs Disbelief
alt_text: Boxed flow diagram of Surah al-Baqara's chiastic structure: top row A→B→C→D leads to pivot E (Ka'ba); bottom row F→G→H→I returns symmetrically. E is highlighted in green; arrows on right and left show the U-turn through the pivot.
notes: Visual chiasm of Surah al-Baqara with Ka'ba/qibla change as central pivot. Same content as image 005 in spatial-flow form.
